title: Welcome to My Blog
description: Introducing my new blog where I'll share thoughts on tech, Japan, and building digital products from rural Okayama.

title: One Prompt. One Hour. One Website.
description: How I built my entire portfolio website in under an hour using AI - and why this changes everything for non-technical founders.

title: Code, Craft & Culture: Building from Rural Japan
description: What it's like developing software and building digital products from Okayama, Japan—away from the tech hubs.

title: Building a Minimal Blog with Vite and TypeScript
description: How I built a zero-maintenance blog system using markdown, static generation, and vanilla JavaScript—no frameworks required.

title: Your Complete Guide to Master DevOps
description: A curated collection of YouTube tutorials covering DevOps fundamentals to advanced topics like Docker, Terraform, Kubernetes, and Ansible.

title: Web 3.0 Fundamentals | From 0 to 1
description: A comprehensive weekly newsletter series covering Web3 fundamentals including wallets, DeFi, NFTs, bridges, stablecoins, and more.

title: Step-by-Step Guide to Becoming a Software Developer: Learn to Code and Get Hired!
description: A comprehensive guide with free resources to learn coding, build your portfolio, and land your first software development job.

title: Become a Web3 Developer with Ethereum Blockchain: A Guide to Learning and Getting Hired!
description: A curated collection of resources to help you become a blockchain developer, focusing on Ethereum, Solidity, and Web3 job opportunities.

title: Privacy, Anonymity and Surveillance on the Blockchain
description: Exploring the challenges of privacy on public blockchains and the emerging solutions like Zero Knowledge Proofs and ring signatures.
